---
title: "A Cypher Knowledge Graph of British Imperial Territorial Evolution"
author:
  - name: Jim Clifford
    affiliation: University of Saskatchewan
date: "2026-05-14"

paper_id: "002"
type: "dataset"
version: "v1.0"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.20189978"

categories:
  - knowledge graphs
  - wikidata
  - linked open data
  - computational history

external: "https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-002-empire-evolution/"

# This stub exists only so the journal listing can index the paper's metadata;
# the canonical content lives at the external URL above. Tell search engines
# to follow the canonical and skip the stub.
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-002-empire-evolution/">
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex,follow">
---

This paper is published at its own site:
[→ Read the paper](https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-002-empire-evolution/)

The canonical version lives in the paper's own repository. This page exists
only so the main journal listing can index the paper's metadata.
